mapper.select: SELECT id, json_path as jsonPath, workflow_name as workflowName, workflow_type as workflowType, create_time as createTime FROM gen_picture_workflow_path WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, json_path as jsonPath, workflow_name as workflowName, workflow_type as workflowType, create_time as createTime FROM gen_picture_workflow_path WHERE workflow_type = #{workflowType}
SELECT id, json_path as jsonPath, workflow_name as workflowName, workflow_type as workflowType, create_time as createTime FROM gen_picture_workflow_path ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gen_picture_workflow_path (json_path, workflow_name, workflow_type, create_time) VALUES (#{jsonPath}, #{workflowName}, #{workflowType}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gen_picture_workflow_path SET json_path = #{jsonPath} WHERE id = #{id}
